debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.L P
⊢ ↑(Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p) ≥
    -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
      ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P))

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hp' : p > P.L
    · exact (P.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (p := p)
        (hp := le_trans hp (by
          have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
            have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
            have : (P.L : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) < P.n := by exact_mod_cast P.hL
            exact (Real.le_sqrt hn_pos).2 (le_of_lt (by
              simpa [pow_two] using this))
          exact this) hp')
    · have hp0 : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
        have : P.initial.balance p ≥ 0 := by
          simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
        exact_mod_cast this
      have hm0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by
        by_cases hn : P.n = 0
        · simp [hn]
        · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn1
          nlinarith
      linarith
  have h₂ : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
  linarith

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ -(P.M * Real.log P.n) := by
    have : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by
      simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using

  · have : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by

          exact_mod_cast le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le) (le_rfl)))))
        ) (hp' := by exact lt_of_lt_of_le P.hL_pos hp)
      · simpa using this
      · exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
          intro hn
          have : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
          exact (ne_of_gt this) hn)
  · have : P.initial.balance p = 0 := by
      simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime, hprime]
    simp [this, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]

have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ - P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by
    have : (p : ℕ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := (le_trans hp (le_of_lt (by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
        have : 0 < P.L * P.L := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
        exact_mod_cast lt_of_lt_of_le this P.hL.le
      have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
        rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]; exact_mod_cast by nlinarith [P.hL]
      exact hL_lt_sqrt)))
    exact (Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge P this (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos) hp)).trans
      (by linarith)
  have h2 :
      (- (P.M : ℤ) * (Real.log P.n : ℤ) : ℤ) ≥
        (- (P.M : ℤ) * (Real.log P.n : ℤ) - (P.M : ℤ) * (P.L : ℤ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℤ)) := by
    omega
  nlinarith

have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have := Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (P := P) (p := p)
      (hp := le_trans hp (by
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
          have : 0 < P.L * P.L := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
          have : 0 < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le this.le P.hL.le
          exact_mod_cast this
        have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
          have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ (Real.sqrt P.n) ^ 2 := by
            simpa [sq] using (show (P.L : ℝ) * P.L ≤ P.n from by
              exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt P.hL))
          have hs : 0 ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := Real.sqrt_nonneg _
          have hl : 0 ≤ (P.L : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le _
          exact (pow_two_le_pow_two_iff hl hs).1 (by simpa [pow_two] using this))
      (hp' := by exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.cast_lt.2 P.hL_pos) (by exact_mod_cast hp)))
    simpa using this
  have h2 :
      (-P.M * (Real.log P.n) : ℝ) ≥
        (-P.M * (Real.log P.n) - P.M * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * primeCounting P.n) := by
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * primeCounting P.n := by positivity
    linarith
  exact h2.trans h1

have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := le_trans hp (by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
      have hL_le_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
        rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos P.n with hn0 | hnpos
        · subst hn0; simp at P.hL
        · have hnpos' : (0 : ℝ) < (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnpos
          have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt P.hL)
          simpa [sq] using (Real.le_sqrt_of_sq_le hnpos'.le this)
      exact_mod_cast hL_le_sqrt)
    have := Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge P (p := p) hp_sqrt (by
      have : p > P.L := by
        have := lt_of_le_of_lt hp (lt_of_lt_of_le P.hL_pos.le (le_rfl))
        exact (this.false.elim)
      exact this)
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
  have h2 : (-((P.M : ℤ) : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) -
        ((P.M : ℤ) : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ)) ≤
      -((P.M : ℤ) : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : 0 ≤ ((P.M : ℤ) : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    linarith
  exact ge_trans h1 h2

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by

      exact neg_nonpos.mpr this
    nlinarith
  · have : P.initial.balance p = 0 := by
      unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
      simp [Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
    simp [this]

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ - P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by
    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by positivity

  have h₂ : (-(P.M : ℤ) * (Real.log P.n) : ℝ) -
        (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) ≤

    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    linarith
  have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h₁
  linarith

have : (-(P.M : ℤ) : ℤ) ≤ P.initial.balance p := by
    have : (P.initial.balance p) ≥ (-P.initial.balance p) := by omega
    omega
  have hM_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.M)
  have hL_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.L)
  have hpi_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
  have hlog_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0

    · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn) |> Nat.succ_le_of_lt)

      -((P.M : ℝ)) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) - (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    have h1 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := mul_nonneg hM_nonneg hlog_nonneg
    have h2 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
      nlinarith [mul_nonneg hM_nonneg this, hpi_nonneg]
    nlinarith
  have hbal : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ -(P.M : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast this
  nlinarith [hbal, h_rhs_le]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by

  have hL : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.L)
  have hL2 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
  have hpi : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le (primeCounting P.n))

    nlinarith [hM, hL, hL2, hpi, hlog]

  have hpi : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le (primeCounting P.n))

    linarith

    exact le_trans (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) from by
      exact_mod_cast (Int.ofNat_le.mpr (Nat.zero_le _))) (le_rfl _)
  exact le_trans this hb

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by

  have h₂ :

    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * primeCounting P.n := by positivity

have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_nonneg _
      have hL_le_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
        have hL2 : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ P.n := by

        simpa [pow_two] using (Real.le_sqrt_of_sq_le hn_pos hL2)

    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    have : (-((P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ))) ≤ 0 := by linarith

have h1 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have hp' : p > P.L := by
      have : (P.L : ℕ) < p := by omega
      exact this
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (P := P) (p := p)
        (hp := by
          have : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hp
          have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
          have hL_le_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
            have hn_pos' : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
              have : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
              exact_mod_cast this
            have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 < P.n := by
              have : (P.L : ℕ) * P.L < P.n := by
                have := P.hL
                simpa [pow_two] using this
              exact_mod_cast this
            have hnonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.L)
            exact (sq_lt_iff_lt_sqrt hn_pos').1 ⟨by nlinarith, this⟩ |>.le

    have : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (P.M : ℤ) * (P.L : ℤ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℤ) := by positivity
    exact neg_nonpos.mpr this
  have h3 : (-((P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n) : ℤ) ≥
      (-((P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n) - (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    linarith
  have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥
      (- (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n - (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ)) := by
    have h1' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by exact_mod_cast h1

      have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ)^2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n - P.M * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    have h' : P.initial.balance p ≥

      have : True := trivial
      have := le_of_eq (rfl : (P.initial.balance p) = (P.initial.balance p))

      have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by

    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := le_trans (by
      have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n
    · simpa using (Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge (P := P) (p := p) hp_sqrt (by
        exact lt_of_le_of_lt hp P.hL_pos))
    · have : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M := by

      have : (- (P.M : ℝ)) ≥ - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := mul_nonneg hM_pos hn_pos

  have h₂ :

    simpa using Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge P (p := p)
      (hp := le_trans hp (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos) (by
        have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 < P.n := by exact_mod_cast P.hL
        have hLpos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.L := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
        have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
        have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
          by_contra hgt
          have : (P.n : ℝ) < (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
            have := (Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _) ).1 ?_
            · simpa [pow_two] using this
            · nlinarith [hgt]
          exact (lt_irrefl _ (this.trans_le (le_of_lt this))).elim
        exact this))))
      (hp' := hp')
  have h₂ : (- (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ)) ≥
      - (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) -
        (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    linarith [mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)) (by positivity)]
  exact h₁.trans h₂

have h₁ : P.initial.balance p ≥ -P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have hp_sqrt : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := le_trans hp (by
      have : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := Nat.cast_nonneg _
        have hL2 : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 < P.n := by exact_mod_cast P.hL
        have h := (sq_lt_sq).1 ?_ 
        · exact le_of_lt (Real.lt_sqrt_of_sq_lt hn_pos hL2)
        · exact (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.L : ℝ) from by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _))
        · exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _
      exact this)
    have hp_gt_L : p > P.L := by
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne hp (by
        intro h; subst h
        exact lt_irrefl _)
    simpa using (Params.initial.balance_small_prime_ge P (p := p) hp_sqrt hp_gt_L)
  have h₂ : (-P.M * Real.log P.n : ℤ) ≥
      (-P.M * Real.log P.n - P.M * (P.L ^ 2 : ℕ) * primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
    linarith
  have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥
      -P.M * Real.log P.n - (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) := by
    have h₁' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ (-P.M * Real.log P.n : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast h₁
    linarith [h₁', (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 * (primeCounting P.n : ℝ) from by positivity)]
  simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_two] using this
